summary: The diff shows that frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx was modified to restore the original logo (ao-farms-logo.dim_320x160.png) and remove the redundant text title added in Version 16. This directly addresses REQ-1. The file summary confirms: 'restored the logo to the original ao-farms-logo.dim_320x160.png asset and removed the redundant text title that was added in Version 16.' Navigation links and other header/footer elements appear unchanged. No hallucinated features were detected.
